titleStmt.title: SII 26.506: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 506. (A.R. No. 479 of 1909.) EDIRKŌṬṬAI, SATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: A slab set up in a place to the east of the same village.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva: Year 8+1, I (?) Chittirai 28 = 1260, A.D. April 21, (Wednesday).

summary.p: It records a gift of land, by purchase, half a vēli in extent, in Veṇbaikkuḍi in Veṇbaikkuḍi-nāḍu, for food and other offerings to the god Kuḷanagai Kāvalīśvaramuḍaiyar of Pulliṇaikkuṟuchchi, a dēvadāna of the temple of the god Vikkiramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Veṇbaikkuḍi. It is not clear who the donor was, but probably the king himself donated the land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭai
yapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 vatu Etirām
māṇṭu cittirai mātam 2 10 8
tiyati veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭu
veṇpaikkuṭi Uṭaiyār vik
kiramapāṇṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāya
ṉār tevatāṉam pulliṇaikkuṟu
cciyil nāyaṉār kuḷanakai kāvali
śvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Amutupa
ṭi cāttuppaṭikku veṇpaikkuṭi
tāṉattār pakkal caṇṭeśvara
vilaiyākak koṇṭiṭṭa veli
nilam Arai Innilam Araikkum cūḻe
llaikkuk kiḻellai karumuḻip paṟ
ṟu virapavuttirapiḷḷai cantāṉac
cāpattukku meṟkum teṉṉel
laināyaṉ � ṭṭai ceykku vaṭa
kkum mel Ellai meṟpaṭiyā
ṉ ceyyil melvarampu pe ṟ
Digital edition of SII 26.506 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
